title: isotrema reticulatum
intro: Isotrema reticulatum, also known as the 'Netted Isotrema', is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Isotrema reticulatum include wound healing, pain relief, and immune system support. Isotrema reticulatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, with the latter being used topically for skin issues and wounds.
